name: midscene-test
description: AI-driven E2E test generation and management with Midscene + Vitest + Playwright
abstract: Skill for generating, updating, debugging, and running AI-driven end-to-end tests. Uses Midscene for natural-language element interaction, Vitest as the test framework, and Playwright for native browser automation. Covers API references, test scaffolding templates, CRUD workflows, and troubleshooting guides.
author: midscene
scope: E2E test writing, updating, debugging, and execution
